descriptionZh: 人工智能/机器学习实验室规则

spacingOverrides.reason: GPU server racks generate more heat; wider clearance improves airflow
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: GPU服务器机柜产生更多热量，更宽的间距改善气流

spacingOverrides.reason: High-density GPU racks require extra front clearance for hot-swap maintenance
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: 高密度GPU机柜需要额外的前方间距用于热插拔维护

spacingOverrides.reason: Dense cabling for GPU clusters requires wider rear access for cable management
spacingOverrides.reasonZh: GPU集群的密集布线需要更宽的后方通道进行线缆管理

ventilationOverrides.reason: GPU clusters (30-70 kW/rack) require significantly higher cooling capacity
ventilationOverrides.reasonZh: GPU集群（30-70 kW/机柜）需要显著更高的冷却能力

ventilationOverrides.reason: Adjacent workspace absorbs residual heat from compute zones
ventilationOverrides.reasonZh: 相邻工作区会吸收计算区域的余热

additionalAdjacency.reason: High-power GPU clusters need direct access to electrical and cooling infrastructure
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: 高功率GPU集群需要直接连接电力和冷却基础设施

additionalAdjacency.reason: AI/ML simulation workloads require minimal latency to GPU compute
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: AI/ML仿真工作负载需要与GPU计算资源的最低延迟

additionalAdjacency.reason: ML research teams require frequent whiteboard sessions for model architecture review
additionalAdjacency.reasonZh: ML研究团队需要频繁的白板讨论进行模型架构评审

additionalSpacing.description: Minimum floor loading capacity for GPU rack zones
additionalSpacing.descriptionZh: GPU机柜区域最小地板承载能力

additionalSpacing.description: Hot aisle containment minimum ceiling height
additionalSpacing.descriptionZh: 热通道封闭最小天花板高度

notes: AI/ML labs with GPU clusters exceeding 20 kW per rack should implement hot/cold aisle containment. Consider liquid cooling for densities above 40 kW per rack.
notesZh: GPU集群超过20 kW/机柜的AI/ML实验室应实施冷热通道封闭。密度超过40 kW/机柜时应考虑液冷方案。
